Title: Modal Open Time - Few Locations
Preconditions:
- 1-5 pickup locations configured
- DevTools Performance tab
Steps:
1. Open Performance tab
2. Start recording
3. Open pickup modal
4. Stop recording
5. Measure time to interactive
Expected Result:
- Modal opens instantly (<500ms)
- No visible delay
- Smooth animation

Title: Modal Open Time - Many Locations
Steps:
1. Start performance recording
2. Open pickup modal
3. Measure time to fully loaded
Expected Result:
- Modal loads within 1 second
- List populated
- Map renders

Title: Modal Open Time - High Volume
Steps:
1. Start performance recording
2. Open pickup modal
3. Measure time
4. Check for pagination/clustering
Expected Result:
- Modal loads within 2 seconds
- Pagination or clustering used
- Acceptable performance

Title: Search Response Time
Steps:
1. Type search query
2. Measure time until results filter
3. Repeat with different queries
Expected Result:
- Results appear within 500ms
- No lag while typing
- Debouncing effective

Title: Filter Response Time
Preconditions:
- Pickup modal open
- Multiple filters available
Steps:
1. Apply filter
2. Measure time for list update
3. Measure time for map update
Expected Result:
- Filter applied within 500ms
- List and map sync quickly
- No noticeable delay

Title: Map Interaction - Pan
Steps:
1. Open DevTools Performance
2. Pan map by dragging
3. Monitor frame rate
Expected Result:
- Smooth 60fps panning
- No jank or stuttering
- Responsive to drag

Title: Map Interaction - Zoom
Steps:
1. Record performance
2. Zoom in/out multiple times
3. Check frame rate
Expected Result:
- Smooth 60fps zoom
- Tiles load quickly
- No blank areas

Title: Map Marker Clicks
Steps:
1. Click marker rapidly
2. Measure info window response
3. Click different markers
Expected Result:
- Info windows open immediately
- No lag on clicks
- Smooth transitions

Title: Memory Usage - Initial
Steps:
1. Take heap snapshot
2. Note initial memory
3. Open pickup modal
4. Take another snapshot
Expected Result:
- Reasonable memory footprint
- No excessive allocation
- Memory proportional to data

Title: Memory Leak Detection
Steps:
1. Take initial snapshot
2. Open/close modal 10 times
3. Take snapshot after each close
4. Compare memory growth
Expected Result:
- No significant memory growth
- Proper cleanup on close
- Garbage collection effective

Title: Memory Under Load
Steps:
1. Perform many operations:
   - Multiple searches
   - Open/close modal
   - Switch between locations
2. Monitor memory over time
Expected Result:
- Memory stable over time
- No unbounded growth
- Page remains responsive

Title: Network Request Count
Steps:
1. Clear network log
2. Open pickup modal
3. Perform search
4. Count API calls
5. Type rapidly, count calls
Expected Result:
- Reasonable number of requests
- Debouncing prevents excess calls
- No redundant requests

Title: Network Payload Size
Steps:
1. Open modal
2. Check response sizes
3. Verify compression
4. Check for unnecessary data
Expected Result:
- Responses appropriately sized
- GZIP compression used
- No bloated payloads

Title: CSS Animation Performance
Steps:
1. Record during modal open
2. Check for layout thrashing
3. Verify GPU acceleration
Expected Result:
- Animations use transforms
- No forced reflows
- Smooth 60fps

Title: Paint/Layout Metrics
Steps:
1. Record page interactions
2. Check paint events
3. Check layout events
4. Identify long tasks
Expected Result:
- Minimal paint operations
- No unnecessary layouts
- No tasks >50ms

Title: Page Load - Category
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Measure LCP (Largest Contentful Paint)
3. Measure FID (First Input Delay)
4. Measure CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift)
Expected Result:
- LCP < 2.5s (Good)
- FID < 100ms (Good)
- CLS < 0.1 (Good)

Title: Page Load - Product
Steps:
1. Navigate to product page
2. Measure Core Web Vitals
3. Check image loading
Expected Result:
- Product page loads quickly
- Images lazy load
- Interactive quickly

Title: Page Load - Cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Measure load time
3. Measure time to interactive
Expected Result:
- Cart loads within 2s
- All items render
- Interactions work immediately

Title: API Response Times
Steps:
1. Monitor API calls during session
2. Note response times
3. Identify slow endpoints
Expected Result:
- Most responses < 500ms
- No timeouts
- Acceptable performance

Title: Scroll Performance - Long Lists
Steps:
1. Navigate to category with many products
2. Scroll through list
3. Monitor frame rate
Expected Result:
- Smooth 60fps scrolling
- No jank
- Virtual scrolling if needed
